metadata.description: Behavior + orchestration skills that make Opus 4.8 more Fable-like, backed by an exhaustive three-arm eval sweep.

plugins.name: make-opus-fable
plugins.description: 9 skills (verify-before-done, deep-audit, quant-thesis, judgment, long-horizon-protocol, memory-discipline, visual-grounding, debugging, native-code) + the verifier agent. Note: the always-on behavior core and the deterministic hooks are delivered by install.sh, not the plugin (plugins cannot modify CLAUDE.md or auto-load these hooks).
